global_description: A small, slender songbird with a streamlined body and a short, slightly hooked bill. It features olive-green upperparts and white underparts with a distinctive red eye. The wings and tail are short and rounded, and the bird has a smooth, sleek texture.

part_details.head: Small and rounded with a red eye and a short, slightly hooked bill.
part_details.underparts: White, contrasting with the darker upperparts.
part_details.wings: Short and rounded, matching the olive-green upperparts.
part_details.tail: Short and rounded, continuing the olive-green coloration.

spatial_relations: The red eye is set prominently on the small rounded head.
The short bill is positioned at the front of the head.
The wings are attached to the sides of the body, short and rounded.
The tail extends from the rear of the body, short and rounded.
